overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing dense urban architecture with large holographic advertisements and corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with corporate buildings and holographic ads

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and large vertical billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past the Delamain building, then tilting head up to view the towering architecture

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and boots walking past the camera on the left

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'DELAMAIN' and 'MARQUESS' gold signage
large glowing advertisement screen showing a figure in red clothing
blue pole with horizontal LED light fixture
futuristic cars parked along the street curb behind glass barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic city sidewalk at night, flanked by the Delamain corporate building on the right and a massive holographic billboard on the left. The camera walks forward past a pedestrian in red, then tilts upward around 6.5 seconds to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza under massive structural beams with pink lighting

events.description: camera tilts back down to forward-facing position
entering the area under large pink and orange structural overhang

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward under the massive overhead structure, passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the covered structure

entered.detail: massive pink and orange steel beams forming a high ceiling structure with colorful lighting
modern building with illuminated 'softsys' signage in white letters
large green industrial trash container with graffiti

segments.scene_description: After looking up at the towers, the camera returns to street level and enters a covered plaza area beneath massive pink-lit structural beams. The Delamain building falls behind as the Softsys building comes into view on the right. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and the environment feels more enclosed and sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching major intersection with crosswalk

events.description: pedestrian density increases and more glowing umbrellas become visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the intersection, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and colorful clothing

notable_agents.action: futuristic orange utility truck driving along the wet street
person with glowing red umbrella walking past the camera

entered.detail: illuminated green 'WALK' text projected on the ground at the upcoming crosswalk
massive dark glass building with illuminated windows towering above the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza, the scene opens into a wider urban space approaching a major intersection. The Softsys building looms larger on the right while a massive glass skyscraper dominates the view ahead. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas become more numerous, and an orange utility truck drives past on the right as the camera approaches the illuminated crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated pedestrian crosswalk with grid pattern and holographic building ads

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk with green 'WALK' projection visible on the wet asphalt
continuing across the wide intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following the crowd, navigating between pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with glowing green umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: white grid pattern painted on the asphalt marking the crosswalk boundaries

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing the wide wet intersection, following a dense crowd of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. The green 'WALK' projection is visible on the asphalt underfoot, and the white grid pattern of the crosswalk dominates the ground plane. The Softsys building recedes into the distance on the right as the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a narrow corporate sidewalk into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins on a wet walkway flanked by the Delamain building and a massive holographic billboard, briefly tilting upward to reveal towering neon skyscrapers against the dark sky. As the camera returns to street level, it glides into a sheltered plaza beneath massive pink-lit structural beams, where the environment becomes more enclosed as the Softsys building comes into view. The scene then opens into a wider urban space where the Softsys building looms larger and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas multiply, just as an orange utility truck drives past toward a major intersection. Finally, the camera crosses the wide, reflective asphalt of the intersection, following a dense crowd over a green walk projection and white grid patterns toward the opposite sidewalk.
